titles.en: Reward of shedding tears on hearing about Ahle Bayt (a.s.)
Reward of shedding tears on hearing about Ahle Bayt (a.s.)

segments: حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ بَکْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَزْدِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: تَجْلِسُونَ وَ تَتَحَدَّثُونَ قَالَ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاکَ نَعَمْ قَالَ إِنَّ تِلْکَ الْمَجَالِسَ أُحِبُّهَا فَأَحِبُّوا أَمْرَنَا إِنَّهُ مَنْ ذَکَرَنَا وَ ذُکِرْنَا عِنْدَهُ فَخَرَجَ مِنْ عَیْنِهِ مِثْلُ جَنَاحِ الذُّبَابَهِ غَفَرَ اللَّهُ ذُنُوبَهُ وَ لَوْ کَانَتْ أَکْثَرَ مِنْ زَبَدِ الْبَحْرِ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ بَکْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَزْدِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: تَجْلِسُونَ وَ تَتَحَدَّثُونَ قَالَ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاکَ نَعَمْ قَالَ إِنَّ تِلْکَ الْمَجَالِسَ أُحِبُّهَا فَأَحِبُّوا أَمْرَنَا إِنَّهُ مَنْ ذَکَرَنَا وَ ذُکِرْنَا عِنْدَهُ فَخَرَجَ مِنْ عَیْنِهِ مِثْلُ جَنَاحِ الذُّبَابَهِ غَفَرَ اللَّهُ ذُنُوبَهُ وَ لَوْ کَانَتْ أَکْثَرَ مِنْ زَبَدِ الْبَحْرِ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan from Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar who said it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. Ishaq b. Sa’eed from Bakr b. Muhammad al-Azdi from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: 'Do you sit and talk (about our narrations)?' I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you, yes.' He said, 'Indeed, I love those gatherings, so love our matter. Indeed, whoever mentions us and we are mentioned in their presence, and a tear as small as a fly's wing comes out from their eye, Allah forgives their sins, even if they are more than the foam of the sea.'
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan from Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar who said it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. Ishaq b. Sa’eed from Bakr b. Muhammad al-Azdi from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: 'Do you sit and talk (about our narrations)?' I said, 'May I be sacrificed for you, yes.' He said, 'Indeed, I love those gatherings, so love our matter. Indeed, whoever mentions us and we are mentioned in their presence, and a tear as small as a fly's wing comes out from their eye, Allah forgives their sins, even if they are more than the foam of the sea.'

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارِ قَالَ
